prestazioni: 2UR-GSE 5.0L V8 naturally aspirated engine: Full Tomei Powered by HKS Stage 3+ stroker kit (87mm forged crank, 10.5:1 compression pistons, and titanium valves) with HKS GT-SS turbocharger system (Garrett GTX4202R turbo, 1000cc ID1000 injectors, and HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold) pushing 750whp on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU for precise ignition and fuel mapping.

KW Suspension Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers with custom valving for the RC F's multi-link rear and double-wishbone front suspension, paired with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars and a full Whiteline rear subframe lockout kit to eliminate chassis flex under hard cornering.

OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2-way) with 45% preload and carbon fiber driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop, combined with a Tilton 7.25" twin-disc clutch and lightweight flywheel to handle the increased torque while maintaining OEM-level drivability.
estetica: Veilside Fortune 3 widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (hand-laid by Seibon Carbon) to fit 20x10.5 ET25 front and 20x12 ET45 rear wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 and 315/30/20 respectively).

Full Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit (carbon fiber front bumper, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3D-printed active rear wing (inspired by the Lexus LFA) featuring adjustable angle via electric actuators and a Gurney flap for downforce tuning.

Custom interior by Status Racing featuring Recaro SP-G TS seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub, and a full carbon fiber dash overlay (including center console and door cards) with Alcantara-wrapped A-pillars and headliner for weight reduction and luxury feel.
